content: We can reframe MemoryBank for long-context conversation alignment as an active learning agent itself, rather than just a static storage layer, by borrowing the 2025 SOTA paradigm of memory as an active learning agent. This lets MemoryBank proactively query for missing user preference context, prioritize retention of high-impact conversational signals that improve alignment, and forget low-relevance details dynamically based on alignment objectives.
source_topics: memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
